goal: Drain the inbox strictly by weight on the repaired state layer. Structural floors first: acs-verdict-always-written-with-reason (verdict diagnosability), ship-landed-verification-floor, loop-must-base-lanes-on-origin-main, build-selfcheck-hard-gate-at-deliverable-contract (a red selfcheck REFUSES the build deliverable via the E2 correction ladder), percycle-audit-apicover-newexport-parity (redesign the reproduction against a TEMP module copy, flip its skip back to a hard pin, make the composed gate enforcing). Then the operator-directed solutions: codegraph blast-radius per docs/architecture/code-graph-blast-radius.md, triage-unified-solution-synthesis, graduated-remediation-fix-forward, telemetry collectors (run go test ./cmd/evolve/ before handoff — known blocker note in the item). Every fix: TDD red-first, regression test, adversarial audit, wiring proof in the composed production path. No inert API. Tests must NEVER mutate the live repo tree — use temp module copies.

phases.name: cycle-recorded
phases.key_findings: cycle completed; ledger walk deferred to future slice
